heading: How issued
label: 2482 How issued
text: A certificate of plant variety protection shall be issued in the name of the United States of America under the seal of the Plant Variety Protection Office, and shall be signed by the Secretary or have the signature of the Secretary placed thereon, and shall be recorded in the Plant Variety Protection Office.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “the signature of the Secretary” for “his signature”.Pub. L. 103–349
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994
